ralplan_summary.decision: Use a visual-only semantic state contract for the caddie shot visual, with tests proving scenario-derived visual drivers and preventing recommendation summary leakage.
ralplan_summary.chosen_option: Option B — Formalize a visual-only semantic state contract and test every driver.

execution_stories: Evidence mapping from scenario to visual state
test_requirements: Assert the visual state exposes aimBias, ballHeight, stanceTilt, windDirection, windStrength, and trajectory.
Assert summary-bearing fields and copy do not leak into the visual state or visual subtree.
Cover scenario-to-visual mappings for ball height, aim bias, stance tilt, wind, and trajectory.
Assert rendered data hooks and feet/stance/ball primitives exist at runtime or component-render level where practical.
Preserve guardrails against backend/API/auth/GPS/map/weather/external services/canvas/3D/motion-viewer dependencies.

coordination.shared_mental_model: Task JSON, inbox, completed PRD/test-spec artifacts, and leader-owned G001 ultragoal audit are authoritative.
coordination.closed_loop_readback: Worker-1 acknowledged that Task 3 owns only the handoff artifact and must reference completed planning artifacts without mutating .omx/ultragoal.
boundaries_checked: PRD artifact exists and is scoped to evidence-based shot visual product contract.
Test spec artifact exists and includes required subagent-integrated coverage gaps.
Handoff references leader checkpoint requirements but does not create or mutate ultragoal state.
integration_risks: Implementation should prefer a testable visual-state helper or prop-driven visual component before relying solely on source regex.
Leader must perform aggregate quality gates before any G001 ultragoal checkpoint.

recommended_execution.default: $ultragoal leader checkpoint for G001 after integrating team evidence
recommended_execution.test_review_owner: test-engineer or verifier if semantic coverage is disputed
recommended_execution.designer_review_owner: designer only if the visual remains hard to understand after semantic tests pass

completion_evidence_expected: Coordination protocol: coordinated - handoff boundaries checked against PRD, test spec, task JSON, and leader-owned G001 audit.
